name: Spline MCP Server
what_it_does: Spline MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Spline — the popular browser-based 3D design tool used for creating interactive 3D web experiences, animations, and design assets. Enables reading scene state, modifying 3D objects and animations, managing Spline projects, and integrating 3D design capabilities into agent-driven creative workflows.
use_cases: Creating and modifying 3D scenes and objects from design automation agents
Animating 3D elements and interactions from creative workflow agents
Exporting 3D assets and code from Spline for web integration from development agents
Managing Spline design project files from creative coordination agents
Generating 3D visual content for web applications from full-stack development agents
not_for: Complex 3D production workflows (use Blender, Maya, or Cinema 4D MCPs for professional 3D)
CAD and engineering 3D work (Spline is for interactive web 3D, not precision engineering)
Teams not using Spline for 3D design
best_when: A developer or designer using Spline for interactive web 3D needs AI assistance creating and modifying scenes — Spline is popular for landing pages, product visualizations, and interactive web experiences.
avoid_when: You need professional 3D production capabilities — Spline is for web-focused interactive 3D, not production-grade 3D modeling.

auth.notes: Spline API key required. Generate from Spline account settings. Set SPLINE_API_KEY environment variable. Spline account (free tier available) required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Spline free tier: unlimited public scenes, limited private scenes
pricing.paid_tiers: Spline Pro: $15/month for private scenes, team features, and advanced exports
pricing.notes: Spline has a generous free tier. MCP server is free open source. Pro plan needed for private/commercial projects with full export capabilities.

performance.rate_limits: Spline API rate limits apply; not heavily documented

known_agent_gotchas: Spline API is not comprehensively documented — community MCP may not cover all features
3D scene manipulation requires understanding Spline's object model and hierarchy
Spline updates frequently — MCP may lag behind Spline API changes
Exporting scenes to code requires specific plan tier — verify export capabilities
Community MCP with limited documentation — may require trial and error for complex operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key auth. Spline cloud-hosted scenes — design data stored on Spline servers. Free tier scenes may be public by default — check privacy settings.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Cloud-hosted 3D scenes. Free tier scenes may be public. Use Pro plan for private commercial design work.
